case_title: SHERATON LOCKETT VS. CARPENTER'S HOME FOR GIRLS,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOCKETT, SHERATON AS TO DEFENDANT CARPENTER'S HOME FOR GIRLS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOCKETT, SHERATON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARPENTER'S HOME FOR GIRLS, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $100,706.84 PRINCIPAL, $1,237.87 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $102,394.71
